title: Final Protocol - Realistic Zombie Apocalypse Survival
description: Point of no return. Can you make the antidote and become unstoppable? Survival isn't guaranteed.
body: --- > _5.0 **New Beta Update** now available only on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/final-protocol)_ --- # 🦠 VIRUS & HEALTH _The virus has mutated — a single bite can infect you and kill you within minutes._ _You’ll need to craft proper protective gear (at least partially effective…)._ ![Virus System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c24cc3e51c4c3b2f63215ba643a1ff9339f8c1e.png) --- # 💉 VACCINE ![image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229681d8f8f286ecb6fd041753d7287aaf4b3c55_0.webp) _You start with **3 weak vaccines**. After you use them… you're on your own._ _That’s why starting vaccine production early is crucial._ ![image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ebcc6c0a4241aaa8e1d3bc072b29e4d731b694d.png) --- # 🧟 ZOMBIES _Zombies have been overhauled — they’re smarter, faster, and much more dangerous._ _But don’t worry, they won’t break your walls… for now._ _**Every week** you will face an invasion ( i think, i forgor tbh )_ --- # 🌡 REALISM > • Temperature, seasons, and crop cycles > • Thirst and nutrition > • New animals > • Advanced smoke mechanics & air pollution > • Weather overhaul > • Enhanced sound ambience > • **Guns**, obviously > • …and plenty more to discover. Try not to die. --- # 🌆 TERRAIN & CITIES _The overworld has been fully refreshed._ _Denser forests, better nature distribution, and stronger atmosphere._ _You may also encounter **destroyed apocalyptic cities** (enabled by default)._
